snippet.title: The Model Context Protocol (MCP)
snippet.description:
Theo Chu, David Soria Parra and Alex Albert dive into the Model Context Protocol (MCP), the standard that's changing how AI applications connect with external data and tools.

Anthropic open-sourced MCP in November 2024.

Learn more about MCP: https://modelcontextprotocol.io

Read the initial announcement: https://anthropic.com/news/model-context-protocol

0:00 Introduction 
0:35 MCP and core components
3:13 How it started
6:22 Launching MCP and reception
8:12 Making it open source
9:55 Current state 
13:23 Tips for getting started 
14:57 Favorite MCP servers
16:23 Claude 4 improvements
18:18 What's next
